topics.query_en: Strassen's matrix multiplication divide and conquer algorithm explained
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزمية شتراسن لضرب المصفوفات Strassen's algorithm
topics.reason: Students struggle with memorizing the seven recursive equations and understanding how the algebraic manipulation reduces the time complexity below O(n^3).

topics.query_en: Closest pair of points problem divide and conquer algorithm
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزمية أقرب نقطتين Closest Pair Problem
topics.reason: The merge step, specifically filtering and checking points within the boundary strip in linear time, is geometrically and logically complex.

topics.query_en: Karatsuba algorithm for large integer multiplication
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزمية كاراتسوبا لضرب الأعداد الكبيرة Karatsuba
topics.reason: Understanding the mathematical trick that reduces four recursive multiplication calls to three to achieve sub-quadratic time complexity is highly counter-intuitive.

topics.topic_en: Quick Sort Partitioning and Worst-Case Analysis
topics.topic_ar: تقسيم الترتيب السريع وتحليل أسوأ حالة
topics.query_en: Quick sort algorithm partitioning Lomuto Hoare worst case time complexity
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزمية الترتيب السريع Quick Sort وتحليل التعقيد
topics.reason: Tracing the in-place partitioning pointers and mathematically proving why already sorted arrays cause O(n^2) worst-case performance is challenging.

topics.query_en: Solving divide and conquer recurrence relations Master Theorem
topics.query_ar: شرح نظرية الماستر Master Theorem وحل علاقات التكرار
topics.reason: Formulating the mathematical recurrence relation T(n) from recursive code and solving it using the Master Theorem requires strong discrete math skills.
